area_program_compliance.notes: All 10 programmed spaces from area-program.json confirmed in architectural design set at approved sizes. Total 2,000m² verified. Full accessibility compliance matrix completed for all public areas per NOM-001-STPS and IMSS/ISSSTE standards. Civic art space integrated into vestibule and sala de usos múltiples as intended.

structural_coordination_notes: Structural engineer engaged. Preliminary structural coordination sketch completed in Phase 2 deliverable. Foundation type under review — flat municipal land, soil study results pending engineer review. Public building occupancy classification confirmed with structural engineer. Coordination meetings scheduled for Phase 3 engineering coordination.
